wind_info.description: Headwind from 11 o'clock

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH is manageable in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH is a solid option in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH is manageable in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH is a solid option in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

wind_info.description: Headwind from 11 o'clock

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH is manageable in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH is a solid option in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH is manageable in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH is a solid option in this headwind. Use an overstable disc.

wind_info.description: Light crosswind from 2 o'clock (left to right)

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH is manageable. The wind is pushing from left to right, away from the flight plate. Use a hyzer angle.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH is a viable option in this wind.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH is challenging as your natural fade and the wind push in the same direction. Consider an overstable disc and a controlled hyzer, but LHFH is likely safer.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH is the recommended shot here. The wind will help push the disc to the right.

wind_info.description: Strong crosswind from 9 o'clock (right to left), gusts to 20.6 mph

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH is exposed to a strong right-to-left crosswind. Prefer RHFH to avoid the disc turning over.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH is strongly recommended. This wind will push the disc left, so an overstable disc thrown with a hyzer will fight it.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH is a good option here. Your natural fade to the right works with the wind pushing left. Use a hyzer-stable disc to keep it straight.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH is also a strong play. This wind will help push the disc left, so an overstable disc is recommended.

bh.shot_strategy: RHBH is exposed to a right-to-left crosswind. Prefer RHFH to avoid the disc turning over.

fh.shot_strategy: RHFH is recommended. This wind will push the disc left. Use an overstable disc.

bh.shot_strategy: LHBH is a good option here. Your natural fade to the right works with the wind pushing left. Use a hyzer-stable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH is a good play. This wind will help push the disc left. Use an overstable disc.

fh.shot_strategy: LHFH is a solid choice for this headwind. An overstable disc will perform well.
